A1_uq_benchmark: TIE among distribution-free methods (jackknife+ MACE 0.0018, Mondrian/weighted conformal 0.0037, split 0.0042 — statistically tied), DECISIVE win over parametric/Bayesian-approx priors. Selective-prediction AURC: all methods in a tight 0.112-0.120 band near the 0.118 random line, far from 0.048 oracle. So conformal is best-in-class for CALIBRATION but the base predictor's ranking signal is weak. Powered (58,558 rows), pre-registered, committed methods only. Honest: rigor win (removes 'did standard UQ do as well' objection) but NOT a novelty result.
A1b_novelty_ablation: NULL, reported plainly. Against a pre-registered held-out mouse-KO immune referee, the committed genetic/eQTL FUSION gate does NOT make better-supported GO calls than a matched conformal-trust-ONLY rule (fusion precision 0.27 vs trust-only 0.36, 10/22 decisions diverge, perm p=0.46). The orthogonal-evidence fusion — the project's claimed novelty — adds no measurable value over calibration alone on this axis. A real, honest, somewhat deflating finding.
A2_risk_control: MARGINAL/scoped-positive. RCPS implemented (genuine distribution-free risk control). Delivers a VALID finite-sample certificate in the per-assay recalibrated regime (Norman n=105) but is VACUOUS in the committed donor-blocked LODO regime (n=4 donors — too few exchangeable units). Honest: the naive fold-spread was already adequate for LODO; RCPS quantifies the exchangeability price honestly rather than improving coverage. Transfer result cleanly reproduced (fail 0.05/0.08/0.17 -> recalib 0.76/0.86/0.93).
A3_scale_robustness: Marginal coverage ROBUST + well-powered at universe scale (11,526 genes: 0.791/0.890/0.947). BUT conditional coverage BREAKS on the largest-effect perturbations (0.657 at nominal 0.90, deviation -0.24) and top expression/cell-count strata. Pre-registered rule -> verdict NOT robust. Honest: the calibration holds marginally at scale but is miscalibrated exactly where effects are biggest — a real, disclosed limitation.
NET: The merit execution produced FOUR honest results, of which: one rigor win (conformal best-calibrated, A1), one NULL on the core novelty claim (fusion adds nothing over calibration, A1b), one marginal methods result that mostly quantifies a limitation (A2), and one robustness result that surfaces a NEW conditional-coverage limitation (A3). Net: the work STRENGTHENS the 'well-calibrated methods' story modestly but WEAKENS the 'orthogonal-evidence gate is the novelty' claim. This is the honest ceiling behaving exactly as predicted — rigor accumulates, but no lever crosses into validated-novel-science.
